events.notes: I2 fresh-authored as a synthesis-driven new composition from Lean-module substrate (no per-paper-draft sources to lift; sourceless per PAPER_DRAFT_MAPPING.md). 28 referenced Lean modules. 820 lines / 9 sections. Mathlib upstream coordination plan §7 is conditional on R1/R2/R3 gate. AI-tool-assistance disclosure protocol documented. Software-only fallback path documented for Mathlib-acceptance delay scenario. Ready for reviewer triple (Stage 9/10/13).

Round 1 claims-reviewer remediation (5 BLOCKERs + 5 advisories addressed). BLOCKER fixes: (1) softened 4 not-shipped declaration claims to 'planned' / 'project-internal supporting lemmas' framing — VerifiedJackknife.Helpers (§2.1), QuasitriangularBialgebra/RibbonHopfAlgebra typeclasses (§4.4), ComputableAdjoinRoot bridge (§5.1, abstract); (2) test filename corrected from tests/test_jackknife.py → tests/test_verified_statistics.py with 4 test names cited; (3) per-module count drifts reconciled (§3 RibbonCategory 12→14; §4 QuantumGroupHopf 18→16 thm; §6 SU2kMTC 16→17, SU2kSMatrix 18→20, SU3kFusion 27→29, FibonacciMTC 16→18); aggregate counts reconciled (§4 86→101, §5 162→161, §6 11 files→10 files / 265→295 declarations; abstract 192-declaration → ~640 declarations); (4) bibliography reconciled — paper15methodology + paper44riemannian self-cites removed; 7 textbook/software bibitems (efron1982, wolff2004, bakalov2001, egno2015, turaev2010, kassel1995, mathlib4) added to src/core/citations.py CITATION_REGISTRY (Wave 6 textbook exemption applied; paper entries got DOI + arxiv where known). Advisory fixes: Lüscher chroma misattribution corrected (now 'SciDAC/USQCD Chroma codebase' descriptor); Microsoft Majorana attribution softened to 'broader research community'; Kaul-Majumdar emergent-MTC dependency now discloses IsolatedHorizonHypotheses tracked-Prop bundle (Phase 6j W1) per advisory #5. All 7 bibitems now have at least one \cite{} invocation in body. Ready for round-2 claims-reviewer + round-2 figure-reviewer (after figure-author subagent's PNGs verified).

Stage-13 round-1 adversarial-reviewer remediation (5 REQUIRED + 1 RECOMMENDED). All addressed (no BLOCKERs surfaced; verdict was YELLOW). Fixes: (Gate 1) wolff2004 attribution corrected in bibitem and CITATION_REGISTRY (removed 'ALPHA Collaboration' — arxiv lists only Ulli Wolff); (Gate 4) §2 line 232 second occurrence of tests/test_jackknife.py → tests/test_verified_statistics.py (the round-1 fix had hit a different occurrence; this was the missed one); (Gate 7 — three §9 attribution-claim hallucinations) replaced with verifiable categorical-prior-art statements: removed fictitious 'Steinberg pivotal-category Coq library', 'Agda unimath' (UniMath is Coq, not Agda), and 'Isabelle/AFP Tensor Networks submission'; rewrote §9 to cite UniMath (Coq/Rocq, real) and Agda categories (real) as actual parallel ecosystems with documented scope; updated §3 prior-art audit list correspondingly; broadened Microsoft Quantum reference to 'broader research community pursuing Majorana-fermion-based non-Abelian-anyon platforms (including industrial proposals such as Microsoft Quantum's, Google Quantum AI's surface-code work, and academic/national-lab Majorana-detection experiments)'; (Gate 9) §5 number-field count clarified as ~161 declarations under the convention used in §3/§4, with explicit acknowledgment that broader counting conventions yield ~+3; (Gate 5 RECOMMENDED) Fibonacci universality reference softened from 'universality proof' to 'universality infrastructure (R-matrix non-trivial-eigenvalue checks, sigma-matrix orders, density-of-image conditions)' with explicit disclosure that the universality theorem itself is not yet shipped as a single named theorem. Ready for Stage-13 round 2 to verify.

Stage-13 round-2 adversarial-reviewer remediation (1 REQUIRED + 1 RECOMMENDED; verdict was YELLOW; round-2 verified 6/6 round-1 findings remediated cleanly). Fixes: (7.1 REQUIRED Gate 9) §5 per-module counts updated to canonical convention: QCyc3 11→12, QCyc15 18→19, QCyc15SqrtPhi 10→11; cumulative count 161→164; hedging clause about alt-convention +3 dropped (the +3 was actual count drift, not convention sensitivity). (5.6 RECOMMENDED Gate 7) §8 dropped the 'Google Quantum AI's surface-code work' clause from the Majorana-fermion non-Abelian-anyon parenthetical (surface code is abelian-toric-code-class stabilizer QEC, not non-Abelian-anyon TQC). Ready for Stage-13 round 3 to verify GREEN.
